scripts.dev: pnpm -C ../.. --filter @peruvigia/shared run build && tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.build: pnpm -C ../.. --filter @peruvigia/shared run build && tsup src/server.ts --format esm --out-dir dist --clean
scripts.test: pnpm -C ../.. --filter @peruvigia/shared run build && vp test run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.sync:contraloria: pnpm -C ../.. --filter @peruvigia/shared run build && node --import tsx src/scripts/sync-contraloria.ts
scripts.sync:dji: pnpm -C ../.. --filter @peruvigia/shared run build && node --import tsx src/scripts/sync-dji.ts
